const express = require("express"); const cors = require("cors"); const session = require("express-session"); const app = express(); const PORT = 3000; // ========================== // Middlewares // ========================== app.use(express.json()); app.use(cors({ origin: true, credentials: true })); app.use(express.static(__dirname)); // 🔐 Session app.use(session({ secret: "secret-key", resave: false, saveUninitialized: true })); // ========================== // Data (temporary storage) // ========================== const data = { properties: [ { id: 1, title: "Villa moderne", city: "Alger", type: "Villa", price: 200000, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/300", user_id: 1 } ], subscribers: [], users: [] }; // ========================== // 🏠 Add Property // ========================== app.post("/add-property", (req, res) => { if (!req.session.user) { return res.status(401).json({ message: "Login required ❌" }); } const { title, city, type, price, image } = req.body; if (!title || !city || !type || !price) { return res.status(400).json({ message: "Missing data ❌" }); } data.properties.push({ id: Date.now(), title, city, type, price: Number(price), image, user_id: req.session.user.id }); res.json({ message: "Property added ✅" }); }); // ========================== // 📄 Get Properties // ========================== app.get("/properties", (req, res) => { res.json(data.properties); }); // ========================== // 🗑️ Delete Property // ========================== app.delete("/delete-property/:id", (req, res) => { if (!req.session.user) { return res.status(401).json({ message: "Login required ❌" }); } const propertyId = Number(req.params.id); const userId = req.session.user.id; const index = data.properties.findIndex( (p) => p.id === propertyId && p.user_id === userId ); if (index === -1) { return res.status(403).json({ message: "Not allowed ❌" }); } data.properties.splice(index, 1); res.json({ message: "Deleted successfully ✅" }); }); // ========================== // 🔍 Search Properties // ========================== app.get("/search", (req, res) => { const { city, type, minPrice, maxPrice } = req.query; let result = data.properties.filter(p => { const cityMatch = city ? p.city.toLowerCase().includes(city.toLowerCase()) : false; const typeMatch = type ? p.type.toLowerCase().includes(type.toLowerCase()) : false; const priceMatch = (minPrice && maxPrice) ? (p.price >= Number(minPrice) && p.price <= Number(maxPrice)) : false; if (!city && !type && !minPrice && !maxPrice) { return true; } return cityMatch || typeMatch || priceMatch; }); res.json(result); }); // ========================== // 📧 Subscribe // ========================== app.post("/subscribe", (req, res) => { const { email } = req.body; if (!email) { return res.status(400).json({ message: "Email required ❌" }); } data.subscribers.push({ email }); res.json({ message: "Subscribed successfully ✅" }); }); // ========================== // 👤 Register // ========================== app.post("/register", (req, res) => { const { username, password } = req.body; if (!username || !password) { return res.status(400).json({ message: "Missing data ❌" }); } const user = { id: Date.now(), username, password }; data.users.push(user); res.json({ message: "User registered ✅" }); }); // ========================== // 🔐 Login // ========================== app.post("/login", (req, res) => { const { username, password } = req.body; const user = data.users.find( (u) => u.username === username && u.password === password ); if (!user) { return res.status(401).json({ message: "Invalid credentials ❌" }); } // 🔥 نخزن المستخدم في session req.session.user = user; res.json({ message: "Login successful ✅", user }); }); // ========================== // 👤 Current User // ========================== app.get("/me", (req, res) => { res.json(req.session.user || null); }); // ========================== // 🚀 Start Server // ========================== app.listen(PORT, () => { console.log(`Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`); });
